push 100 counter     # line 0: initialize counter
duplicate            # line 1: loop start — copy for printing
out_number           # line 2: print value
push 10              # line 3: newline ASCII
out_char             # line 4: print newline
push 5               # line 5: step
subtract counter     # line 6: counter = counter - 5
duplicate            # line 7: copy for comparison
push -101            # line 8: threshold (counter > -101 means counter >= -100)
greater              # line 9: 1 if still in range
branch 1             # line 10: loop back if true
